====Pokémon====

|desc={{p|Houndoom}} was used by Malva in her battle against [[Alain]] and his [[Alain's Charizard|Mega Charizard X]]. Mega Houndoom put up a good fight, but ended up being defeated by the Flame Pokémon's {{m|Blast Burn}}.

It reappeared Mega Evolved alongside its Trainer in ''[[XY134|The Right Hero for the Right Job!]]''.

It appeared again in ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', where it helped to destroy the [[Giant Rock]].

It appeared again in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]'', during a flashback.

Houndoom's known moves are {{m|Flamethrower}}, {{m|Smog}}, {{m|Crunch}}, and {{m|Dark Pulse}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Flash Fire}}.}}
